name: Boa Gambrel Garage Plan - 14x16 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Storage | DIY Shed & Workshop Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roof profile that increases vertical space and enhances the structure's visual character.
The 14x16 footprint offers ample room for tools, motorcycles, ATVs, lawn equipment, or a compact vehicle while still leaving space for workbenches and storage.
The gambrel roof naturally creates overhead loft potential-perfect for storing seasonal items, tools, or building an elevated storage platform.
Straightforward framing and efficient dimensions make Boa a practical project for both beginner builders and experienced DIY enthusiasts.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Boa Gambrel Garage - a versatile 14x16 barn-style garage and workshop space designed for efficiency, durability, and classic architectural charm. Featuring the iconic gambrel roof profile, Boa maximizes interior headroom while creating the timeless look of a traditional barn structure.
